hero.title: Innovation Lab
hero.description: Ongorora inopindirana demos, kuyedza, uye hunyanzvi hwekuratidzira kubva kuchikwata chedu cheinjiniya.

hero.title: Innovation Lab
hero.description: Isu tinoongorora miganhu inoshanda muAI, otomatiki, uye akagoverwa masisitimu, tobva tashandura kutsvagisa kwakasimbiswa kuita kugona kwekugadzira kwakavimbika.

researchAreas.title: Nzvimbo dzekutsvagisa
researchAreas.description: Nzvimbo yega yega yekutarisa inobatanidza kutsvagisa kwekuongorora nenzira dzekumisikidza dzakagadzirirwa chaidzo-nyika masisitimu.

detailedFocusBriefs.title: Detailed Focus Briefs
detailedFocusBriefs.description: Zvirongwa zvekutsvagisa zvenguva pfupi parizvino zvinofamba kubva pakusimbisa kwekuvaka kuenda kune zvirongwa zvekuendesa.

fromLabToProduction.title: Kubva kuLab kuenda kuKugadzira
fromLabToProduction.description: Innovation paHorizon inoyerwa nemhedzisiro yakatumirwa, kwete yakasarudzika prototypes.

roadmap.title: R &D Roadmap
roadmap.description: Kufambira mberi kwakasarudzika kubva pakuvaka kugona kusvika kuchinjika, kuenderera mberi nekuvandudza masisitimu.

publications.title: Publications & Insights
publications.description: Kunyora kwehunyanzvi uye kumisikidza manotsi kubva kuenderera mberi kwebasa rehunyanzvi.

appliedAi.title: Applied AI Systems
appliedAi.description: Kugadzira-kwakatarisana neAI zvivakwa zvinosanganisira modhi yekushandira, chimiro orchestration, uye kutonga kuyedza.

automationFrameworks.title: Automation Frameworks
automationFrameworks.description: Zvemukati otomatiki zvishandiso zvekuendesa kuchengetedzeka, mhinduro yechiitiko, uye inodzokororwa mainjiniya workflows.

advancedArchitecture.title: Advanced Architecture Kuedza
advancedArchitecture.description: Tsvagiridzo mune yakasimba, yakagoverwa zvivakwa zvakagadziridzwa mashandiro, kushivirira kwemhosva, uye chiyero.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: Njere pamucheto weyakaderera-latency sarudzo, telemetry kugadzirisa, uye chishandiso ngarava kubatana.

nlp.title: Natural Language Processing
nlp.description: Multilingual kunzwisisa mapaipi ekuparadzanisa, kuburitsa, kushandura, uye masisitimu ekukurukurirana.

evolutionaryAlgorithms.title: Evolutionary Algorithms & Optimization
evolutionaryAlgorithms.description: Kutsvaga uye kugadzirisa masisitimu akafuridzirwa nesarudzo yechisikigo kugadzirisa matambudziko epamusoro-soro einjiniya.

automationFrameworks.title: Automation Frameworks
automationFrameworks.description: Tiri kuvaka composable workflow masisitimu ekuburitsa orchestration, magedhi emhando yepamusoro, uye post-kuendesa kuongororwa kudzikisira kukakavara kwemanyorerwo uku uchivandudza kuvimbika.

advancedArchitecture.title: Advanced Architecture Kuedza
advancedArchitecture.description: Yedu yekuvaka kuyedza inotarisa pane nzira dzekuora kwebasa, muchinjikwa-dunhu rekusimba mapatani, uye mashandiro emashandisiro emasisitimu anoshanda pasi pekugadzikana kudiwa.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: Tiri kusimbisa chiitiko-kutenderera uye kumucheto inference dhizaini iyo inogonesa kukurumidza sarudzo dzemuno uku ichichengetedza kutonga kwepakati, kuongorora, uye modhi yehupenyu hwehutongi.

adaptiveCapacityPlanning.title: Adaptive Capacity Planning
adaptiveCapacityPlanning.description: Lab prototypes inosimbiswa ichipesana neyakafananidzwa mitoro uye yozobatanidzwa mupuratifomu autoscaling marongero.

operationalIntelligence.title: Operational Intelligence
operationalIntelligence.description: Mapaipi eNLP anofamba kubva kuongororwa kuedza kuenda kumabasa ekutsigira ekugadzira kuti akurumidze triage uye akajeka nzwisisa.

optimizationInDeliverySystems.title: Optimization muDelivery Systems
optimizationInDeliverySystems.description: Nzira dzekushanduka-shanduka dzakaedzwa murabhoritari dzinoshandurwa kuita injini dzekugadzirisa kuronga uye kugovera.

edgeDecisioning.title: Edge Sarudzo
edgeDecisioning.description: IoT uye kumucheto inference kuedza kunoomeswa kuita yakaderera-latency masevhisi ane yakasimba kuvimbika zvipingamupinyi.

now.title: Yakashandiswa AI Nheyo
now.description: Wedzera inogadziriswazve modhi-inoshandira matemplate, masuti ekuongorora, uye zviyero zvekucherechedza muzvikwata zvechigadzirwa.

next.title: Autonomous Engineering Workflows
next.description: Shandisa otomatiki masisitimu ayo anoderedza njodzi yekuendesa uye kupfupisa mhinduro dzekutumira.

twelveToEighteenMonths.title: Edge-Native Intelligence
twelveToEighteenMonths.description: Scale hybrid cloud-edge architectures for near real-time inference in latency-sensitive environment.

longHorizon.title: Kuenderera mberi Optimization Systems
longHorizon.description: Batanidza kuyedza, kuongorora, uye kugadzirisa kuitira kuti masisitimu agone kuchinjika zvakachengeteka sezvo mamiriro ezvinhu achichinja.

aiReliability.title: Injiniya AI masisitimu anoramba akavimbika mukugadzirwa
aiReliability.summary: A practical perspective on balancing experimentation velocity with production governance.

distributedArchitecturePatterns.title: Yakagoverwa Zvivakwa Mapatani eMapuratifomu Ekukura Kwepamusoro
distributedArchitecturePatterns.summary: Manotsi emunda kubva kumiedzo yekuvaka yakanangana nekuita, kusimba, uye kushanda nyore.

roadmappingAppliedRd.title: Roadmapping Applied R &D yeBhizinesi Mhedzisiro
roadmappingAppliedRd.summary: Maitiro atinoronga zvirongwa zvehunyanzvi kuitira kuti zviwanikwa zvifambe kubva kuprototype kuenda kune kukosha kunoyerwa.

cta.title: Vaka neHorizon Innovation Lab
cta.description: Batana nesu kusimbisa mazano ekuda nekukurumidza uye kufambisa pfungwa dzakasimbiswa mune yakachengeteka, scalable yekugadzira masisitimu.

hero.title: Applied AI Systems
hero.description: Pfupiso inoshanda yekuti Horizon inogadzira sei, kuendesa, uye mashandiro emuchina kudzidza masisitimu kubva ku prototype kusvika pakugadzirwa.

machineLearningPipelines.title: Machine Learning Pipelines
machineLearningPipelines.description: Kugadzira AI inotanga nemapaipi anodzokororwa anobatanidza data, kuyedza, kusimbisa, uye mhinduro.

modelDeploymentPatterns.title: Model Deployment Patterns
modelDeploymentPatterns.description: Nzira yekuendesa inosarudzwa zvichienderana nezvinodiwa zve latency, kutsoropodza bhizinesi, uye kuomarara kwekushanda.

mlopsOperatingModel.title: MLOps Operating Model
mlopsOperatingModel.description: MLOps maitiro anovimbisa kuti AI masisitimu anogara akavimbika, anodzorwa, uye anochinjika sezvo kushandiswa kuchikura.

monitoringAndReliability.title: Kuongorora uye Kuvimbika
monitoringAndReliability.description: Kucherechedza kunovhara chiuno pakati pemaitiro emuenzaniso uye mhedzisiro yekushanda.

dataAndFeatureEngineering.title: Data uye Feature Engineering
dataAndFeatureEngineering.description: Shanduro yedata yekumedza, macheki emhando yepamusoro, uye tsananguro dzinogadziriswazve dzinogadzira hwaro hwakavimbika hwekudzidziswa kwemodhi.

modelDevelopment.title: Model Development
modelDevelopment.description: Kuedza kunoteedzerwa nekugadziriswa kunodzokororwa, chinangwa metrics, uye otomatiki kuenzanisa baselines.

validationAndSafetyGates.title: Validation uye Chengetedzo Magedhi
validationAndSafetyGates.description: Mamodheru emukwikwidzi anopasa mashandiro, kusimba, uye macheki emitemo asati abvumidzwa kuburitswa.

operationalFeedbackLoops.title: Operational Feedback Loops
operationalFeedbackLoops.description: Post-kutumirwa telemetry inozivisa kudzidzisazve kwekutanga, kudzoreredza sarudzo, uye inotevera iteration kuronga.

realTimeInferenceServices.title: Real-Time Inference Services
realTimeInferenceServices.description: Yakaderera-latency APIs yekudyidzana kunyorera ne autoscaling, caching, uye chikumbiro-chikamu chekucherechedza.

batchAndStreamingPredictions.title: Batch uye Streaming Predictions
batchAndStreamingPredictions.description: Yakarongedzwa uye chiitiko-inotyairwa mapaipi epamusoro-vhoriyamu yekurova pane analytics uye mashandiro ebasa.

edgeAwareDeployment.title: Edge-Aware Deployment
edgeAwareDeployment.description: Hybrid gore-kumucheto kushandira mapatani enharaunda dzinoda inference yemuno uye yepakati modhi manejimendi.

ciCdForModels.title: CI / CD yemamodheru
ciCdForModels.description: Otomatiki kuvaka, kuyedza, uye kuburitsa workflows kunoderedza njodzi yekuendesa uku uchichengetedza kumhanya kwekuendesa.

modelRegistryAndLifecycle.title: Model Registry uye Lifecycle
modelRegistryAndLifecycle.description: Versioned modhi artifacts ine matanho ekusimudzira, mutsara, uye kubvumidzwa workflows inovandudza kutonga uye kuteedzera.

servingInfrastructure.title: Kushandira Zvivakwa
servingInfrastructure.description: Scalable kushandira materu ane nzira dzekuburitsa senge canary uye mumvuri deployments inotsigira yakachengeteka shanduko manejimendi.

monitoringPillars.latencyThroughputAndCostEfficiencyTracki: Latency, throughput, uye mutengo unoshanda kuteedzera
monitoringPillars.dataQualityRegressionAlertsAndRemediatio: Data quality regression alerts uye remediation workflows

cta.title: Scale Applied AI nechivimbo
cta.description: Kana iwe uri kuronga zvirongwa zveAI zvinoda mhedzisiro inoyerwa uye kuchengetedzwa kwenguva refu, Horizon inogona kubatsira kugadzira nekushandisa iyo yakazara system lifecycle.

hero.title: Mitauro yakawanda NLP
hero.description: Ongorora mashandiro ekugadzirisa mutauro wechisikigo uye kuti vanowedzera sei kuita akavimbika, mitauro yakawanda yekugadzira masisitimu.

foundations.title: NLP Nheyo
foundations.description: Mutauro wechisikigo wekugadzirisa unosanganisa zviratidzo zvemitauro uye kudzidza kwemuchina kuti ubvise zvinoreva, chinangwa, uye chimiro kubva kune zvinyorwa.

workbench.title: Inopindirana NLP Workbench
workbench.description: Shandisa demo kuyedza kuonekwa kwemutauro, kurova manzwiro, kuburitsa kwesangano, uye maitiro ekushandura munguva chaiyo.

productionApplications.title: Horizon Inoshandisa Sei NLP muKugadzira
productionApplications.description: NLP kugona kunosanganisirwa mubhizinesi workflows nekuita kwekuchengetedza uye yakajeka mhando metrics.

reliabilityAndGovernance.title: Kuvimbika uye Kutonga Nheyo
reliabilityAndGovernance.description: Kugadzirwa kweNLP kunoda zvinopfuura mhando yemhando yepamusoro; Zvinoenderana nemaitiro akachengeteka ekuburitsa uye kuenderera mberi kwekuongorora.

foundations.intro1: Yemazuva ano NLP masisitimu anopa simba rekutsigira otomatiki, kutsvaga kukosha, kuburitsa ruzivo, uye kubatana kwemitauro yakawanda. Kuitiswa kunobudirira kunoda ese ari maviri mhando yemhando uye yakasimba yekushanda kutonga.
foundations.intro2: KuHorizon, isu tinotarisa kumagumo-kusvika-kumagumo NLP masisitimu ayo anosanganisa yakasimba inference nekucherechedza, hutongi, uye kuyerwa kwekugadzira mhedzisiro.

languageDetection.title: Kuongorora Mutauro
languageDetection.description: Inoratidza mutauro kubva kumapfupi kana marefu mavara zvikamu kuti uendese zvikumbiro mupombi chaiyo yekugadzirisa pombi.

sentimentAnalysis.title: Sentiment Analysis
sentimentAnalysis.description: Inobvisa chinangwa chemanzwiro uye polarity yehungwaru hwevatengi, rutsigiro triage, uye chigadzirwa mhinduro zvishandiso.

entityExtraction.title: Entity Extraction
entityExtraction.description: Inoona masangano akarongeka akadai semazita, makambani, nzvimbo, uye mazuva kubva kune zvisina kurongeka zvinyorwa.

translation.title: Shanduro
translation.description: Inotsigira mafambiro emitauro yakawanda nekushandura mameseji anogadzirwa nemushandisi-kana anoshanda achichengeta mamiriro.

supportAndTicketIntelligence.title: Rutsigiro uye Ticket Intelligence
supportAndTicketIntelligence.description: Kupatsanura zvikumbiro zvinouya nekukurumidzira, chinangwa, uye manzwiro ekumhanyisa nzira uye mhinduro mhando.

governedContentOperations.title: Inotungamirwa Zvemukati Mashandiro
governedContentOperations.description: Shandisa mutemo-anoziva mafirita emitauro uye macheki ekudzora nekuyerwa chaiwo uye kurangarira zvinangwa.

textDrivenBusinessInsights.title: Text-Driven Business Insights
textDrivenBusinessInsights.description: Unganidza mafambiro kubva kumagwaro, ongororo, uye kutaurirana kuzivisa zano uye sarudzo dzekushanda.

evaluationByUseCase.title: Kuongororwa neKushandisa Case
evaluationByUseCase.description: Mamodheru anoenzaniswa nenzvimbo-yakatarwa datasets isati yaitwa sarudzo dzekuburitsa.

humanInTheLoopSafeguards.title: Zvidziviriro zvevanhu-mu-the-loop
humanInTheLoopSafeguards.description: Fungidziro dzepamusoro-soro dzinosanganisira nzira dzekuongorora, mitemo yekuwedzera, uye zviratidzo zvakajeka zvekuvimba.

continuousMonitoring.title: Kuenderera mberi Kuongorora
continuousMonitoring.description: Drift, latency, uye kushomeka kwemhando kunoteedzerwa nguva dzose saka kudzidziswa uye kudzoreredza kunoshanda.

hero.title: Genetic Algorithm Simulation
hero.description: Ongorora kushanduka-shanduka kwekuverenga munzvimbo yekudyidzana uye uone kuti misimboti yakafanana inoshandura sei mukugadzirwa kwekugadzirisa masisitimu.

scientificFoundation.title: Nheyo yesainzi
scientificFoundation.description: Genetic algorithms ndeye huwandu hwevanhu-hwakavakirwa nzira dzekugadzirisa dzakafuridzirwa nesarudzo yechisikigo uye kugadzirisa.

interactiveEnvironment.title: Inopindirana Evolution Environment
interactiveEnvironment.description: Mhanya simulation kuti uone kugwinya kuchivandudza chizvarwa nechizvarwa uye uone kuti kumanikidza kwekusarudza kunokanganisa sei mhedzisiro.

productionUse.title: Horizon Inoshandisa Sei Izvi Mukugadzirwa
productionUse.description: Iyo imwecheteyo yekutsvaga mechanics inoshandiswa mune ino demo inozivisa optimization mapaipi akatumirwa mune anoshanda masisitimu.

applicationDomains.title: Wider Application Domains
applicationDomains.description: Shanduko yekugadzirisa inonyanya kukosha muhurongwa hune zvinangwa zvine simba uye zvinopesana zvipingamupinyi.

scientificFoundation.intro1: Panzvimbo pekutsvaga mhinduro imwe panguva, majini algorithms anoshandura huwandu hwakasiyana hwevakwikwidzi. Chizvarwa chega chega chinoongororwa zvichipesana nebasa rekusimbisa muviri uye chakanatswa kuburikidza nekusarudzwa, kuyambuka, uye kuchinja.
scientificFoundation.intro2: Izvi zvinoita kuti zvibudirire kumatambudziko epamusoro-soro ane zvipingamupinyi zvisiri zvemutsara, uko nzira dzekumisikidza dzinova dzakaomarara kana dzinodhura.

selection.title: Kusarudzwa
selection.description: Vakwikwidzi vanoita zvepamusoro vane mukana wakakura wekupona uye kufurira chizvarwa chinotevera.

crossover.title: Kuyambuka
crossover.description: Hunhu hwakasimba hunosanganiswazve kuti ugadzire mhinduro nyowani dzemukwikwidzi dzine simba rakavhenganiswa.

mutation.title: Shanduko
mutation.description: Inodzorwa randomness inounza kusiyana-siyana kuitira kuti kutsvaga kusamira kutenderedza yemuno optima.

convergence.title: Convergence
convergence.description: Kwezvizvarwa zvakawanda, vanhu vanoenda kune yakagadzikana uye yemhando yepamusoro mhinduro.

resourceScheduling.title: Zviwanikwa Kuronga
resourceScheduling.description: Isu tinoshandisa nzira dzekushanduka-shanduka kukwidziridza kuronga kwakawanda-zvipingamupinyi uko brute-simba kutsvaga kusingagoneke.

architectureTuning.title: Architecture Tuning
architectureTuning.description: Zvivakwa zvekumisikidza zvivakwa zvinoongororwa iteratively kuti zvivandudze mashandiro uye mutengo unoshanda.

continuousOptimization.title: Kuenderera mberi Optimization
continuousOptimization.description: Optimization mabasa anomhanya mune inodzorwa zvishwe ine telemetry mhinduro saka masisitimu anochinjika sezvo kudiwa profiles kuchinja.

routeAndLogisticsPlanning.title: Route & Logistics Planning
routeAndLogisticsPlanning.description: Yakaoma kuendesa uye kuronga kutumira kunobatsirwa nekutsvaga kwekushanduka kana zvipingamupinyi zvichichinja nekukurumidza.

modelAndHyperparameterSearch.title: Model uye Hyperparameter Kutsvaga
modelAndHyperparameterSearch.description: Kutsvaga kwemajini kunogona kuwana mhando yepamusoro modhi yekumisikidza kana nzvimbo dzechinangwa dziine ruzha uye dzisina mutsara.

portfolioAndAllocationProblems.title: Portfolio uye Kugovera Matambudziko
portfolioAndAllocationProblems.description: Optimization pasi pezvinangwa zvinokwikwidza zvinogona kuverengerwa sehutano hwehutano hwekutengeserana pane inoshanduka seti yemukwikwidzi.
